title: Axo's Optimizations [Vulkan]
description: Axo's Optimization but with Vulkan mod
body:
This modpack only contains optimisation mods.

The tests where done on this hardware:

CPU: i5-1235u. 
iGPU: Intel Iris Xe Graphics
RAM: 16GB.
The operating system is Windows 11 Pro.
I did not used V-Sync. 

Vanilla: min 65, av 105, max 115

My modpack: min 100,  av 210, max 260

### Note: 
When you first create a world, you might see a low number of FPS for a few seconds, in my test this did nit lasted more than 10 to 30 seconds. This seems to depend on your computer.

This pack uses Vulkan, which changes the Minecraft rendering engine from OpenGL to Vulkan. This means that many Minecraft mods won't work with it. Please check the Vulkan mod Discord server for an updated list of incompatible mods.
If you're looking for a modpack that has better mod compatibility please take a look at my other one: https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimization-axo/.

## Important Note
I licensed the project under GPLv3, but it's important to remember that every mod in this modpack has its own license. You should respect these licenses first. I'm not directly involved with any of these mods. If you have any problems or complaints, please contact me on Discord (my username is axolotl.c).
